'''moravaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:arage|arage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-r-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arage|arage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| moravaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:moravithi|moravithi]] || [[word:moraviji|moraviji]] || [[word:moravishi|moravishi]] || [[word:moraviki|moraviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:moravuthuthu|moravuthuthu]] || [[word:moravujuju|moravujuju]] || [[word:moravushushu|moravushushu]] || [[word:moravukuku|moravukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:moravuthu|moravuthu]] || [[word:moravuju|moravuju]] || [[word:moravushu|moravushu]] || [[word:moravuku|moravuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:moravufthuf|moravufthuf]] || [[word:moravufjuf|moravufjuf]] || [[word:moravufshuf|moravufshuf]] || [[word:moravufkuf|moravufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:moravethe|moravethe]] || [[word:moraveje|moraveje]] || [[word:moraveshe|moraveshe]] || [[word:moraveke|moraveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:moravothotho|moravothotho]] || [[word:moravojojo|moravojojo]] || [[word:moravoshosho|moravoshosho]] || [[word:moravokoko|moravokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:moravotho|moravotho]] || [[word:moravojo|moravojo]] || [[word:moravosho|moravosho]] || [[word:moravoko|moravoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:moravofthof|moravofthof]] || [[word:moravofjof|moravofjof]] || [[word:moravofshof|moravofshof]] || [[word:moravofkof|moravofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:moravÃŸfthÃŸf|moravÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:moravÃŸfjÃŸf|moravÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:moravÃŸfshÃŸf|moravÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:moravÃŸfkÃŸf|moravÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:moravÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|moravÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:moravÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|moravÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:moravÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|moravÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:moravÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|moravÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:moravÃŸfthÃŸf|moravÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:moravÃŸfjÃŸf|moravÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:moravÃŸfshÃŸf|moravÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:moravÃŸfkÃŸf|moravÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:moravÃŸfthÃŸf|moravÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:moravÃŸfjÃŸf|moravÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:moravÃŸfshÃŸf|moravÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:moravÃŸfkÃŸf|moravÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:moravÃḊthÃḊ|moravÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:moravÃḊjÃḊ|moravÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:moravÃḊshÃḊ|moravÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:moravÃḊkÃḊ|moravÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:moravathatha|moravathatha]] || [[word:moravajaja|moravajaja]] || [[word:moravashasha|moravashasha]] || [[word:moravakaka|moravakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:moravatha|moravatha]] || [[word:moravaja|moravaja]] || [[word:moravasha|moravasha]] || [[word:moravaka|moravaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:moravafthaf|moravafthaf]] || [[word:moravafjaf|moravafjaf]] || [[word:moravafshaf|moravafshaf]] || [[word:moravafkaf|moravafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:moravasha|moravasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:moravshÃḋsha|moravshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:moravrosha|moravrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:moravmusha|moravmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:moravyasha|moravyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomoravnkshÃḋsha|gomoravnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomoravnkrosha|gomoravnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomoravnkmusha|gomoravnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomoravnkyasha|gomoravnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:moraravasha|moraravasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:moraravshÃḋsha|moraravshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:moraravrosha|moraravrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:moraravmusha|moraravmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:moraravyasha|moraravyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomoraravnkshÃḋsha|gomoraravnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomoraravnkrosha|gomoraravnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomoraravnkmusha|gomoraravnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomoraravnkyasha|gomoraravnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:merÃḊvasha|merÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:merÃḊvshÃḋsha|merÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:merÃḊvrosha|merÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:merÃḊvmusha|merÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:merÃḊvyasha|merÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomerÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|gomerÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomerÃḊvnkrosha|gomerÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomerÃḊvnkmusha|gomerÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomerÃḊvnkyasha|gomerÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:morfavasha|morfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:morfavshÃḋsha|morfavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:morfavrosha|morfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:morfavmusha|morfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:morfavyasha|morfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomorfavnkshÃḋsha|gomorfavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomorfavnkrosha|gomorfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomorfavnkmusha|gomorfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomorfavnkyasha|gomorfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
